label: confirmtkt_01_search_mumbai_delhi
task: Search for trains from Mumbai to Delhi on 15 May 2026. List the top 5 trains with their departure times, arrival times, and available classes.

label: confirmtkt_02_cheapest_sleeper
task: Find the cheapest Sleeper class train from Bangalore to Hyderabad on 20 May 2026. Tell me the train name, number, fare, and departure time.

label: confirmtkt_03_fastest_train
task: Search for trains from Chennai to Kolkata on 25 May 2026. Which train has the shortest travel duration? Give me the train name, duration, and departure time.

label: confirmtkt_04_2ac_availability
task: Check if there are any trains with available 2AC seats from Pune to Goa on 18 May 2026. List all trains that show AVL status in 2AC.

label: confirmtkt_05_morning_trains
task: Find all trains departing before 8 AM from Jaipur to Ahmedabad on 22 May 2026. List their names, departure times, and available classes.

label: confirmtkt_06_book_lucknow_delhi
task: Search for trains from Lucknow to Delhi on 28 May 2026. Find a train with available 3AC seats and proceed to book a ticket for 1 passenger.

label: confirmtkt_07_compare_routes
task: Compare trains from Patna to Mumbai on 10 June 2026. How many trains are available? What is the price range for 3AC class across all trains?

label: confirmtkt_08_overnight_trains
task: Search for overnight trains (departing after 8 PM) from Delhi to Varanasi on 5 June 2026. List all options with their 2AC fares.

label: confirmtkt_09_rajdhani_check
task: Are there any Rajdhani Express trains from Kolkata to Delhi on 12 June 2026? If yes, what classes are available and what are the fares?

label: confirmtkt_10_book_2ac_chennai
task: Search for trains from Chennai to Bangalore on 1 June 2026. Book a 2AC ticket on the Shatabdi Express for 2 passengers.

label: confirmtkt_11_waitlist_check
task: Search for trains from Bhopal to Pune on 8 June 2026. Are there any trains where all classes show waitlist (WL) status? List them.

label: confirmtkt_12_tatkal_search
task: Search for trains from Nagpur to Hyderabad on 15 June 2026. Check the availability and fares for Tatkal quota in 3AC for the first available train.

label: confirmtkt_13_short_distance
task: Find trains from Agra to Delhi on 20 May 2026. Which trains have Second Sitting (2S) class available? List their names, fares, and travel times.

label: confirmtkt_14_multiple_dates
task: Search for trains from Kochi to Trivandrum on 25 May 2026. If no trains have available 1AC seats on that date, check the next day (26 May 2026) and report availability.

label: confirmtkt_15_evening_departure
task: Find all trains departing between 4 PM and 8 PM from Indore to Mumbai on 30 May 2026. Compare their 3AC fares and recommend the cheapest one.

label: confirmtkt_16_book_sleeper
task: Search for trains from Ranchi to Kolkata on 3 June 2026. Find a train with Sleeper class availability and start the booking process for 3 passengers.

label: confirmtkt_17_long_route
task: Search for trains from Jammu to Kanyakumari on 10 June 2026. How many trains run on this route? List all available trains with their total journey duration.

label: confirmtkt_18_premium_trains
task: Search for Vande Bharat or Shatabdi trains from Delhi to Chandigarh on 5 June 2026. What premium classes (CC, EC) are available and at what fares?

label: confirmtkt_19_alternate_route
task: I want to travel from Surat to Bangalore on 18 June 2026. Search for direct trains. If less than 3 direct trains exist, also check trains via Mumbai and tell me the options.

label: confirmtkt_20_full_booking
task: Search for trains from Dehradun to Delhi on 22 June 2026. Find the earliest morning train with 2AC available. Proceed to book for 1 passenger and fill in all the traveller details.
